title: Hollow Knight
short_description: A challenging 2D action-adventure set in a vast underground kingdom of insects and heroes.

title: Celeste
short_description: Help Madeline survive her inner demons on her journey to the top of Celeste Mountain.

title: Firewatch
short_description: A mystery set in the Wyoming wilderness where you play as a fire lookout investigating a conspiracy.

title: Stardew Valley
short_description: Build the farm of your dreams in this beloved farming RPG with rich social simulation.

title: Journey
short_description: An interactive parable about two strangers who meet in a vast desert and travel together.

title: A Short Hike
short_description: A short relaxing adventure about hiking to the top of a mountain at your own pace.

title: Hades
short_description: Defy the god of death as you hack and slash your way out of the Underworld in this rogue-like dungeon crawler.

title: Doom Eternal
short_description: The ultimate combination of speed and power as you rip and tear through Hell's armies across dimensions.

title: Devil May Cry 5
short_description: A stylish action game where three demon hunters must unite to prevent a demon tree from devouring humanity.

title: Sekiro: Shadows Die Twice
short_description: Carve your own clever path to vengeance in this brutal and unforgiving action-adventure set in late 1500s Japan.

title: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt
short_description: Play as a professional monster hunter in a vast open world full of meaningful choices and stunning storytelling.

title: Disco Elysium
short_description: A groundbreaking role playing game where you play a detective solving a murder in a city on the brink of revolution.

title: What Remains of Edith Finch
short_description: A collection of strange tales about a family in Washington state as you explore the Finch house.

title: Outer Wilds
short_description: An award-winning mystery about a solar system trapped in an endless time loop.

title: Portal 2
short_description: A mind-bending puzzle game using portals to navigate increasingly complex test chambers with a darkly funny story.

title: Baba Is You
short_description: A puzzle game where the rules themselves are objects you can interact with to solve seemingly impossible levels.

title: The Witness
short_description: Explore a beautiful deserted island filled with hundreds of mysterious puzzles waiting to be solved.

title: Return of the Obra Dinn
short_description: A detective mystery set aboard a ghost ship where you must determine the fate of each crew member.

title: Elden Ring
short_description: An open world action RPG set in the Lands Between, crafted by FromSoftware and George R.R. Martin.

title: Baldur's Gate 3
short_description: An epic RPG set in the Forgotten Realms where your choices shape an epic story of fellowship and betrayal.

title: Divinity: Original Sin 2
short_description: A deep tactical RPG where you choose your race and origin story in a world where magic is outlawed.

title: Dark Souls III
short_description: The latest chapter in the Dark Souls series with a breathtaking world full of interconnected areas.

title: Dead Cells
short_description: A rogue-lite metroidvania that constantly reinvents itself through procedurally generated levels.

title: Shovel Knight
short_description: A sweeping classic action adventure with memorable characters and an 8-bit visual style.

title: Ori and the Blind Forest
short_description: A visually stunning platformer about a young orphan destined for heroics in a dangerous forest.

title: Cuphead
short_description: A classic run and gun action game with hand-drawn 1930s cartoon visuals and brutal difficulty.

title: Inside
short_description: A dark and atmospheric puzzle-platformer from the creators of Limbo with a haunting narrative.

title: Limbo
short_description: A boy enters the land of the dead to search for his sister in this dark and atmospheric puzzle-platformer.

title: Undertale
short_description: A RPG where you don't have to destroy anyone, with a memorable cast and multiple unique endings.

title: Night in the Woods
short_description: A story-focused adventure game about a college dropout returning to her hometown and reconnecting with old friends.

title: Oxenfree
short_description: A supernatural thriller about a group of friends who unwittingly open a ghostly rift.

title: Gris
short_description: A serene and evocative experience about a young girl lost in her own world dealing with a painful experience.

title: Spiritfarer
short_description: A cozy management game about being a ferrymaster for the dead, exploring a fantastical world.

title: Control
short_description: A third-person action-adventure set in a brutalist government building that hides supernatural secrets.

title: Prey (2017)
short_description: A first-person sci-fi action-RPG set aboard a space station overrun by alien predators.

title: BioShock Infinite
short_description: A first-person shooter set in the floating city of Columbia with a mind-bending narrative.

title: Titanfall 2
short_description: A fast-paced first-person shooter with an exceptional single-player campaign and fluid movement mechanics.

title: God of War
short_description: Kratos and his son Atreus journey through the brutal Norse wilds in this emotional action epic.

title: Red Dead Redemption 2
short_description: A sweeping epic tale of life in America at the dawn of the modern era featuring an outlaw gang on the run.

title: Cyberpunk 2077
short_description: An open-world action-adventure set in Night City, a megalopolis obsessed with power, glamour, and ceaseless modification.

title: Monster Hunter: World
short_description: Hunt massive monsters across a living ecosystem in this action RPG with deep weapon customization.

title: Persona 5 Royal

title: Subnautica

title: Terraria

title: Into the Breach

title: Slay the Spire

title: Ori and the Will of the Wisps
short_description: Continue Ori's journey in a beautifully crafted sequel with expanded combat and exploration.

title: Katana ZERO
short_description: A stylish neo-noir action platformer where you slash through enemies using drugs, time manipulation, and lightning reflexes.

short_description: The definitive edition of the award-winning RPG with full voice acting and new political vision quests.

title: Hades II
short_description: The sequel to the award-winning rogue-like dungeon crawler, now featuring Melinoë, Princess of the Underworld.

title: Vampire Survivors
short_description: A gothic horror casual game with rogue-lite elements where your choices can allow you to quickly snowball.

title: Resident Evil 4 Remake
short_description: A reimagining of the iconic survival horror game featuring Leon S. Kennedy on a mission to rescue the President's daughter.

title: Deus Ex: Mankind Divided
short_description: A cyberpunk action RPG where you play an augmented human agent in a society divided by discrimination.

title: Bastion
short_description: An action RPG featuring a reactive narrator who marks your every move in a beautifully hand-painted world.

title: Transistor
short_description: A sci-fi themed action RPG from Supergiant Games where you wield an extraordinary weapon of unknown power.

title: Pyre
short_description: A party-based RPG where you lead a band of exiles through a purgatorial realm to earn their freedom.

title: Tunic
short_description: An isometric action adventure about a small fox exploring a ruined land with a mysterious manual to uncover.

title: Hob
short_description: An action-adventure in a beautiful and mysterious world where you repair and reshape a broken planet.

title: Chicory: A Colorful Tale
short_description: A paint-based adventure game about a dog wielding a magic paintbrush who must restore color to a drained world.

title: Doki Doki Literature Club
short_description: A psychological horror visual novel disguised as a cute anime dating sim that subverts all expectations.

title: Omori
short_description: A surreal psychological horror RPG about a hikikomori boy exploring a dreamlike world with his friends.

title: Disco Elysium
short_description: A groundbreaking RPG where you play a detective solving a murder with unprecedented freedom of choice.

title: Pathfinder: Wrath of the Righteous
short_description: A deep cRPG set in the Pathfinder universe where you lead a crusade against demonic forces.

title: Pillars of Eternity II
short_description: Sail the seas and explore the archipelago of the Deadfire in this richly written RPG sequel.

title: Planescape: Torment Enhanced
short_description: An extraordinary RPG with one central question: What can change the nature of a man?

title: Unpacking
short_description: A zen puzzle game about the familiar experience of unpacking boxes and finding a home for all your belongings.

title: Coffee Talk
short_description: A coffee brewing and conversation game set in a fictional Seattle where fantasy creatures and humans coexist.

title: Alba: A Wildlife Adventure
short_description: Join Alba on a mission to protect the local nature reserve and all the animals that live there.

title: Flower
short_description: Experience the dreams of flowers in this beautiful and meditative journey through wind and petals.

title: Abzu
short_description: Dive into a stunning ocean world full of mystery and wonder in this meditative aquatic adventure.

title: Euro Truck Simulator 2
short_description: Experience the life of a truck driver delivering cargo across beautifully recreated European landscapes.

title: Talos Principle

title: Antichamber

title: The Room

title: Myst

title: Ace Attorney Trilogy
short_description: Three classic courtroom adventure games featuring rookie defense attorney Phoenix Wright.

title: Ghostrunner

title: Hyper Light Drifter

title: Enter the Gungeon
short_description: A bullet hell dungeon crawler following a band of misfits seeking a gun to kill their pasts.

title: Risk of Rain 2

title: Spelunky 2

title: Salt and Sanctuary

title: Blasphemous

title: Metroid Dread
short_description: Samus faces a terrifying new threat as she explores the dangerous planet ZDR in this side-scrolling action game.

title: Graveyard Keeper
short_description: Manage a medieval graveyard while discovering the mysteries of a nearby town in this darkly humorous sim.

title: Planet Coaster
short_description: Build the theme park of your dreams with unprecedented creative control in this stunning coaster simulator.

title: Factorio
short_description: Build and manage factories on an alien planet while defending against native creatures in this addictive automation game.

title: Kenshi
short_description: A free-roaming squad based RPG in a post-apocalyptic world with no story and no hand-holding.

title: Tyranny
short_description: A cRPG where evil has already won and you play as a minion of the overlord shaping the fate of conquered lands.

title: Torchlight II
short_description: An action RPG where you battle monsters through beautiful hand-painted environments in a colorful world.

title: This War of Mine
short_description: A war survival game where you play as a group of civilians, not soldiers, trying to survive in a besieged city.

title: Frostpunk
short_description: A society survival game where heat means life and you are the ruler of the last city on earth.

title: Papers Please
short_description: A dystopian document thriller where you play an immigration inspector controlling who can enter a fictional country.

title: Kenshi
short_description: A free-roaming squad RPG set in a post-apocalyptic world with no hand-holding and total freedom.

title: Noita
short_description: A magical roguelite where every pixel is physically simulated and you wield wands with unpredictable power.

title: A Plague Tale: Innocence
short_description: Guide Amicia and her brother through a devastating plague and inquisition in 14th century France.
